text: Third session with Sofia and my lower back pain has genuinely disappeared. Her cueing is unlike anything I've experienced.
Pilates tip: before you engage your powerhouse, find your exhale first. The breath is the engine — the core follows.
First reformer class done ✓  Margot's cues are so clear — even a complete beginner feels safe. Already booked session 2.
Pilates was originally called Contrology — the complete control of your body. Every rep should be deliberate. Quality over count, always.
Prenatal sessions with Priya have been the most grounding part of my third trimester. The breathwork alone is worth it.
